LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ELIZABETH ZURLINDEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE VOID ON ITS FACE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 473(D)) IS GRANTED.
